_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic imbalance of HMMR/RHAMM regulates the sensitivity and response of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumour cells to aurora kinase inhibition.

_contextSnippet: While no spheroids were identified in 2884 cultures, 5.6 ± 1.2% of S462 cells (168 ±25 of 3,000 seeded) are capable of forming spheroids
details: No spheroids identified in 2884 cultures under stem cell conditions, unlike S462 cells
